articles.author: https://www.abc.net.au/news/rudi-maxwell/105702270
articles.title: Mining on the Moon is closer than ever, but challenges remain - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
articles.description: A scientist, an engineer, an archaeologist and a lawyer break down some of the physical, environmental, ethical and legal challenges of mining on the Moon.
articles.content:
Since Neil Armstrong took his giant step for mankind onto the Moon almost 60 years ago, small samples from the lunar surface have been brought back to Earth.
The samples provide a glimpse into what … [+15508 chars]
